headline: Residential General Contracting Preparation Checklist — La Crescenta-Montrose
articleBody:
Residential General Contracting Preparation Checklist for La Crescenta-Montrose Clients

Before your Residential General Contracting appointment with Opus Builders, make sure you have the following ready:

1. Measurements
2. Budget
3. Design preferences
4. Permits needed
5. Material selections

Contact Opus Builders at (818) 939-8855 to get started.
